creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Bedreddin Sahbaz from comment #2)

> … the keyboard, screen and mouse freezes (black screen has mouse cursor and cursor whole system hangs). …

This set of symptoms might be more a configuration issue, than a bug. Maybe hardware-specific. 

Do you have an account at FreeBSD Forums? 

<https://forums.freebsd.org/>
